message:
events: cache compiled glob regexes in thread-local LRU (256 entries)

`match_rule_glob()` was compiling a fresh `fancy_regex::Regex` from
scratch on every invocation, which is expensive when the same glob
patterns are evaluated repeatedly across many events during a single
automation pass. Add a 256-entry thread-local LRU cache keyed on the
compiled pattern string to amortize regex compilation cost. Patterns
that recur within the same thread hit the cache in O(1) after their
first compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
